nasb.text: David stayed in the wilderness in the strongholds, and remained in the hill country in the wilderness of Ziph. And Saul sought him every day, but God did not deliver him into his hand.

esv.text: And David remained in the strongholds in the wilderness, in the hill country of the wilderness of Ziph. And Saul sought him every day, but God did not give him into his hand.

cnv.text: 大衛住在曠野的山寨裡，又住在西弗曠野的山裡。掃羅天天尋索大衛，　神卻不把大衛交在他手裡。

ccb.text: 大卫住在旷野的堡垒或西弗旷野的山区。扫罗天天搜捕大卫，但上帝没有把大卫交在他的手中。
